# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for datastore security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: datastore_security

# redis-master.conf
port 6379
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
requirepass "strong_master_password_change_in_production"
masterauth "strong_master_password_change_in_production"
replica-announce-ip 10.0.1.10
replica-announce-port 6379
min-replicas-to-write 1
min-replicas-max-lag 10
repl-diskless-sync no
repl-diskless-sync-delay 5
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
repl-backlog-size 256mb
repl-backlog-ttl 3600
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
appendonly yes
appendfsync everysec
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-master.log
loglevel notice
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300
databases 16
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_a8f5f167f44f4964e6c998dee827110c"
rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_b6d767d2f8ed5d21a44b0e5886680cb9"

---

# redis-slave.conf
port 6379
bind 0.0.0.0
protected-mode yes
requirepass "strong_slave_password_change_in_production"
replicaof 10.0.1.10 6379
masterauth "strong_master_password_change_in_production"
replica-read-only yes
replica-serve-stale-data yes
replica-priority 100
replica-announce-ip 10.0.1.11
replica-announce-port 6379
repl-diskless-sync no
repl-disable-tcp-nodelay no
repl-backlog-size 256mb
maxmemory 2gb
maxmemory-policy allkeys-lru
appendonly yes
appendfsync everysec
auto-aof-rewrite-percentage 100
auto-aof-rewrite-min-size 64mb
save 900 1
save 300 10
save 60 10000
stop-writes-on-bgsave-error yes
rdbcompression yes
rdbchecksum yes
dbfilename dump.rdb
dir /var/lib/redis
logfile /var/log/redis/redis-slave.log
loglevel notice
slowlog-log-slower-than 10000
slowlog-max-len 128
timeout 300
tcp-keepalive 300
databases 16
rename-command FLUSHDB ""
rename-command FLUSHALL ""
rename-command CONFIG "CONFIG_a8f5f167f44f4964e6c998dee827110c"
rename-command SHUTDOWN "SHUTDOWN_b6d767d2f8ed5d21a44b0e5886680cb9"
